PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter; $services = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003\); foreach \($port in $services\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; "Port $port`: UP \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "Port $port`: DOWN - $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\('.'\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter; $ports = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port $p -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Port $p`: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\services\\opportunity; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3003 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 3003 up: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed gateway PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Gateway not running" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\gateway; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Gateway port 3000: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3005 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force }; cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\services\\agent; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"smoketest@gbm.local","password":"Smoke1234!"}'; $H = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.data.token\)" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/agent/health" -Headers $H | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)
